_note: v0.16 WS1 fixture for fetch_property_ontology(P26 = spouse). Mirrors the SPARQL SELECT shape of _build_property_ontology_query: ?constraintKind (the constraint-type Q-id), ?cls (the constrained class Q-id), ?subProp/?invProp/?relProp. Here P26 carries a value-type constraint (Q21510865) constraining the value to human (Q5); no single-value constraint (spouse is multi-valued over a lifetime).
